AUM.ERROR_OCCURRED: An error occurred. Please try again.
AUM.NETWORK_ERROR: Network error. Please check your connection.
AUM.UNABLE_TO_CONNECT: Unable to connect to server. Please check your connection.
AUM.INVALID_REQUEST: Invalid request. Please check your input.
AUM.SESSION_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please log in again.
AUM.PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to perform this action.
AUM.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
AUM.CONFLICT_ERROR: Conflict occurred. The resource may have been modified.
AUM.VALIDATION_FAILED: Validation failed. Please check your input.
AUM.SERVER_ERROR: Server error. Please try again later.
AUM.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
